overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vespucci Beach boardwalk. The character passes various beach shops, tennis courts, an outdoor gym area, and continues along the palm-lined promenade on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach boardwalk with tennis courts and shops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the boardwalk past tennis courts and beach shops

entered.detail: green chain-link fence surrounding tennis courts
tall palm trees lining the boardwalk
colorful storefront awnings with beach merchandise
concrete and wood benches along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny beach boardwalk with tennis courts visible behind a green fence on the left. Various beach shops line the right side, and scattered pedestrians walk in both directions. Palm trees line the horizon under a clear blue sky.

events.description: turns right from boardwalk onto street with parked cars and buildings
turns left to rejoin the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: turns onto a side street to view parked vehicles, then turns back toward the beach

notable_agents.action: white sports car parked along the curb

entered.detail: bright green building with medical signage and closed shutters
vehicles parked along the street including a white sports car
wooden utility poles with overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character briefly turns onto an urban side street, revealing parked cars and a distinctive green building with medical signage. After a moment, the character turns left to return to the boardwalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with colorful beach shops

events.description: returns to boardwalk from street, entering dense commercial shop area

agents.ego_description: walking past various beach shops and vendors along the crowded boardwalk

entered.detail: green storefront with cannabis leaf logo and Smoke on the Water signage
bright yellow sign advertising hot dogs and ice cream

segments.scene_description: Back on the boardwalk, the character passes a dense cluster of colorful beach shops including a cannabis dispensary and clothing stores. The sidewalk is busy with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and palm trees continue to line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor beach gym with exercise equipment

events.description: approaches outdoor gym area with blue railings and exercise stations

agents.ego_description: walking past the outdoor gym area where people are exercising on public equipment

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt using the outdoor gym equipment

entered.detail: public exercise equipment with blue metal railings and bars
signage for the outdoor fitness area
green and white concrete benches near the gym area

segments.scene_description: The character passes an outdoor gym area reminiscent of Muscle Beach, featuring blue railings and exercise equipment where people are working out. The scene opens up with more visible grass areas and the beach becoming visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk toward the open beach area

entered.detail: large building with Sidewalk Market signage and surfboard displays
open grassy area with scattered palm trees leading to the beach

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward a more open section of the beachfront, passing the Sidewalk Market building on the right. The left side opens up to a grassy plaza area with palm trees, and the beach becomes visible in the distance under the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny beach promenade that briefly diverts into a quiet urban side street before returning to the coast. It begins with the character walking past tennis courts enclosed by a green fence and a row of beach shops, while pedestrians scatter under a clear blue sky lined with palm trees. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts away from the boardwalk and turns onto a side street, revealing parked cars and a green building marked with medical signage. The camera then follows a left turn to leave the urban block, finally transitioning back toward the open atmosphere of the beach area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling boardwalk that transitions from a dense commercial strip into an open, sun-drenched beachfront plaza. It begins by weaving through a cluster of colorful beach shops and a cannabis dispensary, with pedestrians and palm trees crowding the sidewalk. As the character moves forward, the environment opens up to reveal an outdoor gym area with blue railings and exercise equipment where people are working out. The scene then expands further, passing the Sidewalk Market building as the landscape shifts toward a wide, grassy plaza. Finally, the view opens completely to the distant beach under a bright, clear sky.
